# ====================================================================
# ====  ОТПРАВКА СОБЫТИЯ В KAFKA (ИФТ)  =============================
# ====  Топик: repl.autohealing-event-in                       ======
# ====  Библиотека: kafka-python | PLAINTEXT | порт 9092       ======
# ====================================================================
import json
import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from kafka import KafkaProducer

# ---------- KAFKA (ИФТ) ----------
TOPIC = "repl.autohealing-event-in"
BROKERS = [
    "tvldq-sber00010.delta.sbrf.ru:9092",
    "tvldq-sber00011.delta.sbrf.ru:9092",
]


# ====================================================================
#  PRODUCER
# ====================================================================
def create_producer() -> KafkaProducer:
    producer = KafkaProducer(
        bootstrap_servers=BROKERS,
        security_protocol="PLAINTEXT",
        value_serializer=lambda v: json.dumps(v, ensure_ascii=False).encode("utf-8"),
        key_serializer=lambda k: k.encode("utf-8") if k else None,
        acks="all",              # ждём подтверждения от брокера
        retries=3,
    )
    print("✅ Producer создан.")
    return producer


# ====================================================================
#  ФОРМИРОВАНИЕ СОБЫТИЯ
# ====================================================================
def build_event() -> dict:
    event_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    ts = now.strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.") + f"{now.microsecond // 1000:03d}Z"

    event = {
        "eventId": event_id,
        "timestamp": ts,
        # ==========================================================
        # ↓↓↓  ПОДСТАВЬ СВОИ ПОЛЯ СОБЫТИЯ  ↓↓↓
        # ==========================================================
        # "source": "...",
        # "type": "...",
        # "payload": { ... },
        # ==========================================================
    }
    return event


# ====================================================================
#  ОТПРАВКА
# ====================================================================
def send_event(producer: KafkaProducer, event: dict):
    key = event["eventId"]

    headers = [
        ("ContexId", event["eventId"].encode("utf-8")),
    ]

    print(f"📤 Отправка события | eventId={key}")

    future = producer.send(
        TOPIC,
        value=event,
        key=key,
        headers=headers,
    )

    meta = future.get(timeout=15)   # блокирующе ждём подтверждения доставки
    producer.flush()

    print(f"✅ Доставлено | topic={meta.topic} | partition={meta.partition} | offset={meta.offset}")
    print(f"📌 eventId: {key}")


# ====================================================================
# =====================  ЗАПУСК  =====================================
# ====================================================================
if __name__ == "__main__":
    print("\n🚀 Отправка события в Kafka")

    producer = create_producer()

    try:
        event = build_event()

        print("\n--- Тело события ---")
        print(json.dumps(event, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
        print("--------------------\n")

        send_event(producer, event)

    except Exception as ex:
        print(f"❌ Ошибка: {ex}")

    finally:
        producer.close()
        print("🏁 Готово.")

# ====================================================================
# ====  ОТПРАВКА СОБЫТИЯ AUTOHEALING В KAFKA (ИФТ)  ================
# ====  Топик: repl.autohealing-event-in                       ======
# ====  Библиотека: kafka-python | PLAINTEXT | порт 9092       ======
# ====================================================================
import json
import uuid
import time
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from kafka import KafkaProducer

# ---------- KAFKA (ИФТ) ----------
TOPIC = "repl.autohealing-event-in"
BROKERS = [
    "tvldq-sber00010.delta.sbrf.ru:9092",
    "tvldq-sber00011.delta.sbrf.ru:9092",
]


# ====================================================================
#  ⬇⬇⬇  ТЕЛО СОБЫТИЯ  ⬇⬇⬇
#  Схема из требований (topic repl.autohealing-event-in)
# ====================================================================
def build_event() -> dict:
    now_epoch = int(time.time())          # unix-время в секундах (как в примере требований)
    event_id = str(uuid.uuid4())

    event = {
        "version":               "1.0",
        "eventId":               event_id,
        "itService":             "CI00221084",                  # КЭ ИТ-услуги инцидента
        "priorityCode":          "LOW",                         # LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/IMPORTANT/CRITICAL
        "title":                 "Тестовая Тема",
        "description":           "Тестовое описание",
        "resolutionDescription": "Тестовое решение",
        "itServiceRecoveryCi":   "CI00080068",                  # КЭ услуги-инструмента
        "toolName":              "autoHealing_restart",                  # наименование инструмента
        "scenarioName":          "restarting_virtual_machine",  # наименование сценария
        "factStartDate":         now_epoch,                     # факт. время возникновения
        "startDate":             now_epoch,                     # время начала работ
        "finishDate":            now_epoch,                     # время окончания работ
    }
    return event
# ====================================================================


def create_producer() -> KafkaProducer:
    producer = KafkaProducer(
        bootstrap_servers=BROKERS,
        security_protocol="PLAINTEXT",
        value_serializer=lambda v: json.dumps(v, ensure_ascii=False).encode("utf-8"),
        key_serializer=lambda k: k.encode("utf-8") if k else None,
        acks="all",
        retries=3,
    )
    print("✅ Producer создан.")
    return producer


def send_event(producer: KafkaProducer, event: dict):
    key = event["eventId"]                # ключ = eventId

    future = producer.send(TOPIC, value=event, key=key)
    meta = future.get(timeout=15)         # блокирующе ждём подтверждения
    producer.flush()

    print(f"✅ Доставлено | topic={meta.topic} | partition={meta.partition} | offset={meta.offset}")
    print(f"📌 eventId: {key}")


# ====================================================================
# =====================  ЗАПУСК  =====================================
# ====================================================================
if __name__ == "__main__":
    print("\n🚀 Отправка события AutoHealing в Kafka")

    producer = create_producer()
    try:
        event = build_event()

        print("\n--- Тело события (отправляем) ---")
        print(json.dumps(event, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
        print("---------------------------------\n")

        send_event(producer, event)

    except Exception as ex:
        print(f"❌ Ошибка: {ex}")
    finally:
        producer.close()
        print("🏁 Готово.")

if __name__ == "__main__":
